name: planning
description: Break down a coding task into a structured implementation plan with clear steps, file identification, and risk assessment.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 planning 相關工作
幫我啟用 planning 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 planning

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the planning skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
